fields.name: transfer_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the transfer transaction

fields.name: transfer_date
fields.description: Date and time of the transfer transaction

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Amount transferred, in the account's base currency

fields.name: from_account
fields.description: Account number of the originating account

fields.name: to_account
fields.description: Account number of the destination account

fields.name: transfer_type
fields.description: Type of transfer (e.g. internal, external, etc.)

fields.name: risk_score
fields.description: Risk assessment score for the transfer transaction
